# HIMARK

> Premium strategic growth consultancy headquartered in Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa. Standalone, principal-led, by application only. HIMARK designs and operates the brand, demand, and AI infrastructure beneath founder-led firms ready to compound. Operating with the rigour of a management consultancy and the agility of a founder's office.

HIMARK works with a deliberately limited number of mandates each quarter. Every engagement is personally anchored by a senior principal — there are no junior accounts. Engagements are structured into three retainer tiers and six service categories, all available standalone or built into a tier mandate.

The firm operates by application only. Pricing is confirmed directly with the principal office.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.himark.co.za/home.html): What HIMARK is, who it serves, how engagements begin.
- [Doctrine (About)](https://www.himark.co.za/about.html): The four operating principles that govern every engagement — Volume is a tax on quality; Precision, not volume; Operators, not advisors; On record.
- [Mandates (Services)](https://www.himark.co.za/services.html): Six service categories — Brand Architecture, Digital Infrastructure, Marketing & Demand, AI & Operational Systems, Strategic Advisory, Executive & Transformation — across three tiers (Signature, Growth, Private). The three-tier engagement orbit visualisation.
- [Principals (Team)](https://www.himark.co.za/team.html): Senior consultants who personally anchor every mandate.
- [Direct (Contact)](https://www.himark.co.za/contact.html): General enquiries, press, partnerships, engagement applications. Every channel is read by a principal.
- [Intake (Apply)](https://www.himark.co.za/apply.html): How to begin a HIMARK engagement. Applications run through Atlas — the firm's principal-trained assistant — or via a scheduled 30-minute discovery session.

## Editorial

- [The Journal (Subscribe)](https://www.himark.co.za/subscribe.html): Monthly bulletin. No tracking pixels, no third-party broadcast. Read by everyone on the list, including the principals.
- [Insights](https://www.himark.co.za/insights.html): Long-form writing on growth, brand, demand, and AI infrastructure for founder-led firms.
- [Press & Media](https://www.himark.co.za/press.html): Press kit, principal commentary, and embargoed materials for journalists.

## Engagement details

- [Engagement Dossier (PDF)](https://www.himark.co.za/dossier/HIMARK-Engagement-Dossier.pdf): The firm in a single document — for principal review.

## Firm details

- **Legal name:** HIMARK (Pty) Ltd
- **Founded:** 2026
- **Headquarters:** Randburg, Gauteng, South Africa
- **Email:** info@himark.co.za
- **Phone:** +27 11 555 0100
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 09:00–17:00 SAST
- **Status:** Standalone advisory — no parent corporation
- **Sector:** B2B strategic growth consulting
- **Service area:** South Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa, worldwide remote engagements
- **Operating model:** By application only
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/himark/

## What HIMARK does

HIMARK designs and operates the strategic infrastructure beneath founder-led firms — brand, demand, AI systems, and principal-level counsel. The firm is not an agency. It does not pitch on RFPs. It does not bid on price. Each engagement is scoped against the client's actual trajectory, not a fixed menu.

The three retainer tiers:

1. **Signature Partner** — Foundational growth infrastructure. Quarterly minimum. For startups, SMEs, and professional service firms formalising their market presence.
2. **Growth Partner** — Core HIMARK tier. Scale and optimisation. Six-month minimum. For mid-sized companies scaling through complexity.
3. **Private Partner** — Executive transformation with a dedicated embedded principal. Twelve-month minimum, by invitation only. For high-growth firms and enterprise clients scaling aggressively.

The six standalone service categories:

1. **Brand Architecture** — Identity systems, market positioning, executive personal branding
2. **Digital Infrastructure** — Website, SEO, CRM, lead capture, automation, enterprise systems
3. **Marketing & Demand** — Demand strategy, lead generation, content systems, channel architecture
4. **AI & Operational Systems** — AIRaaS deployment, workflow automation, intelligent routing
5. **Strategic Advisory** — Principal-level workshops, weekly reviews, continuous access (in-tier only)
6. **Executive & Transformation** — M&A architecture, capital strategy, pricing design, executive branding
